deck: Mall of America — The Partnership Deck (Round 2)
notice: Every primary storytelling surface uses AI-generated assets. No real-world brand logos or copyrighted likenesses used in any prompt. Output is rights-cleared by the underlying generation services.

vo: ElevenLabs v3 — voice: Clara (Calm, Distinctive, and Narrative)
copy: Anthropic Claude (live runtime hook in Brand-In-Place flow)

videos.prompt: Slow dolly-in down a luxurious indoor concourse with polished marble floors, soft warm spotlights on flagship storefronts, glowing skylights overhead, anamorphic flares, no logos, no people.
Camera slowly pans down a grand ornate concourse, vaulted ceilings, brushed brass detailing, marble columns, single shaft of golden afternoon light, no people.
Grand multi-level food court, warm hanging pendant lights, copper kitchen accents, motion-blur silhouettes, amber and ruby tones.
A person walks along a pathway beneath a roller coaster, indoor theme park atrium at twilight, neon-lit roller coaster track, glass roof above with streaked sunset, kinetic energy.
Camera slowly pans down the interior, dreamy underwater lighting, dappled caustics, hushed atmospheric.
Slow dolly across a glass skybridge between a luxury hotel tower and a mall concourse at blue hour, city lights through windows, polished brass handrails, no people.

images.prompt: Stylised top-down architectural illustration of a vast mega-mall complex, gold ink line-art on warm parchment, atmospheric vignette edges, no text labels, painterly luxury cartography.
Breathtaking wide-angle cinematic aerial shot of a vast futuristic mall exterior at golden hour, copper and amber palette, anamorphic lens.
Retail zone interior with anchor flow at golden hour.

images.purpose: Brand-In-Place template — Luxury Wing storefront with intentionally empty signage panel for live logo composite
images.prompt: Photorealistic eye-level view of an empty premium storefront on a luxurious indoor mall concourse, polished marble floors, brass trim, large arched glass facade, soft golden lighting, clean blank signage panel above the entrance left intentionally empty, anamorphic lens, no people, no logos.

Photorealistic wide shot of a vast indoor rotunda dressed for a brand activation, large blank LED wall stage backdrop centre frame intentionally empty, concentric balconies above with silhouetted onlookers, dramatic stage lighting in warm gold, atmospheric haze.

images.purpose: Brand-In-Place template — Sea Life sponsor portal
images.prompt: Photorealistic frontal view of an aquarium attraction entry portal, glowing turquoise tunnel visible through doorway, large blank header panel above entrance left intentionally empty, side-lit signage flanks, families queueing in soft focus background.
Sweeping wide-angle of a packed concert in an indoor rotunda at peak energy, stage lights raking across faces, atmospheric haze, anamorphic lens.
Macro detail shot of brushed-brass sponsor signage embedded into mall architecture, soft golden bokeh, luxury detail.
Editorial flatlay of a leasing portfolio: floor plan blueprint, swatches of marble and brass, gold pen, on a dark walnut desk, dramatic side lighting.
Warm overhead shot of a restaurant kitchen pass at service, copper pans, golden plate-up, atmospheric steam.
Modern minimalist pop-up shop interior with raw plywood fixtures and a single statement light fixture, no logos.
Wide proscenium theatre interior with red velvet seats, gilt detailing, single spotlight on an empty stage.

audio.prompt: Modern cinematic orchestral score, slow build, deep cello drone, layered hammered dulcimer, distant brass swell, sparse percussion, hopeful but restrained, instrumental.
Restrained ambient cinematic, soft synth pad in C major, sparse piano motifs, gallery-like, instrumental.
Sparse string quartet over deep sub-bass drone, near-silence between phrases, reverent and prestigious, instrumental.
Warm mid-tempo organic, upright bass, brushed snare, vibraphone, hushed late-night brasserie, instrumental.
Kinetic synth-pop meets orchestral, playful arpeggios, big driving drums, no vocals, slightly cinematic, instrumental.
Underwater ambient, deep granular pads, sparse harp, hydrophone-style low frequencies, dreamy and immersive, instrumental.
Stadium energy build, pulsing kick, soaring synth lead, choir swell, the show is about to start, instrumental.
Late-night jazz-meets-electronic, Rhodes piano, brushed drums, soft saxophone in distance, sophisticated, instrumental.

runtime.purpose: Live 'Why Mall of America fits [Brand]' 3-paragraph generator inside Brand-In-Place. Currently ships a deterministic local generator that mirrors the API contract — swap the function body for a fetch to /api/why-moa to enable live Claude generation. Prompt locked: 'You write 3-paragraph Why-MOA pitches in the brand's voice. Cite real adjacencies and facts.' Cache the system message — same shape, different brand.
